title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 22 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 22 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 22 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends,The main contract I2409 closed at 921. an increase of 2.73% throughout the day .some traders were active to sell; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable.
